text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, I spot Agnes Digital busily<n>working in
front of a supermarket.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hi, come on in! Carrots are on sale<n>for cheap
today!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hey! You're a trainer from Tracen,<n>right? Why
don't you take this<n>opportunity to buy some
carrots for<n>your trainee?

text_block_list.name: Supermarket Owner
text_block_list.text: Great work, Digital! Thanks for your<n>help today!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oops, I'd better head to my next<n>destination
ASAP! Time to put these<n>legs I've strengthened
through racing<n>and simping to use!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Following this, I start spotting Agnes<n>Digital
practically everywhere.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Our bakery's open for business<n>again after
renovations! Come check<n>out our Uma-shaped
carrot bread!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Heya! Here's your House of Speed<n>carrot
ramen!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The newest line of face powders has<n>just come
in! We have all kinds of<n>cosmetics made for
Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Not that they need any makeup since<n>their skin's
always so flawless!<n>Teehuehue...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It seems like she's working from<n>morning till
night. I'm curious as to<n>why, so I decide to ask
her.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hm? I've been running into you a<n>lot... Are you
trying to trigger some<n>sort of event?
choice_data_list: Why are you working so many jobs?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hehe, glad you asked!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
One of my fave's long-awaited photo<n>book will
be releasing soon, and<n>she's holding a signing
event!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Autograph sessions like these are big<n>moments
for my oshis, and as a fan, I<n>can't attend them
wearing just any<n>old outfit!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I always make it a point to wear<n>something nice
that'll match the<n>person I'm meeting!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
That's doing what's proper! Meeting<n>your oshi
is a special occasion! When<n>else would I dress
up?!
choice_data_list: What kind of person is your oshi?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: She's an angel... No, a veritable<n>goddess!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh, if you want to know the date and<n>location of
the book signing, here.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital hands me a flyer<n>detailing the
information of the event.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I bet you're wondering why I just<n>happen to be
carrying that around,<n>huh?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's because a true fan should<n>always be
equipped to spread the<n>good word!
choice_data_list: Being an Uma simp is no joke...

Looking up to someone can be really motivating,
huh?

Looking up to someone can be really motivating,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's because a true fan should<n>always be
equipped to spread the<n>good word!
choice_data_list: Being an Uma simp is no joke...

Looking up to someone can be really motivating,
huh?

Looking up to someone can be really motivating,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Best of luck to us both at the event!<n>Oh... I'm so
excited, there's no way<n>I'm getting any sleep!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm so impressed by Agnes Digital's<n>fervor that
I end up going to her<n>favorite Umamusume's
book signing.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Despite the vast number of fans<n>there, the
Umamusume in question<n>gives each of them
great individual<n>attention.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you went to the signing event too?<n>I knew
you had potential in you!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
There was a celebratory flower<n>display put
together by all the fans<n>who've been supporting
her since<n>day one... It was so touching!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
What's more, I was able to make a<n>new simp
friend! I couldn't have<n>asked for a more bountiful
harvest!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Teehuehue! No need to be so modest<n>about it!
You're already a model<n>simp!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The next day, I see Agnes Digital<n>while walking
through the central<n>plaza.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
How was the signing event? Was<n>she not the
most precious thing in the<n>entire WORLD?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Teehuehue... I bet you want to dress<n>a little nicer
next time you meet your<n>oshi now, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
...Speaking of which, I need to start<n>putting
together my next outfit too!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Well, see you at the next event! Let's<n>cheer on
our oshis with all our heart!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! If it's for the sake of my<n>oshis, I'll work
day and night and<n>overcome any obstacle!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Mwaheehee... If that isn't the best<n>thing ever, I
don't know what is!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Of course, your trainee is also a divine<n>idol who
gives me strength.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It goes without saying, but I'm a huge<n>simp for
every single Uma at Tracen!<n>Huehue! ♪
